label: plain_text
text:
(i)
In roster form, all the elements of a set are
listed, the elements are
being separated
by commas and
are enclosed within braces
{ }. For example, the set of all
even
positive
integers
less than
 7 is described in roster
form as
{2, 4, 6}. Some more
examples of representing
g a set in roster
form are
given
below :
